component.name: SDDM Variant Manager
component.summary: Manage and install SDDM login screen themes

description.p: SDDM Variant Manager lists all installed SDDM themes and helps you apply simple themes or browse multi-variant collections in a Themes/ folder.

Install public themes from GitHub, preview backgrounds, apply variants, and test the full SDDM greeter with sddm-greeter-qt6 --test-mode. Close the full preview with Alt+Tab and the in-app Close preview button.
